record.field: <data> <!-- Step 1: remove all three fields from their current positions --> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='healthprof']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date'][@widget='time']" position="replace"/> <xpath expr="/tree/field[@name='appointment_date'][@widget='date']" position="replace"/> <!-- Step 2: reinsert in desired order before the very first element --> <xpath expr="/tree/button[@name='checked_in']" position="before"> <field name="healthprof" expand="1" width="300"/> <field name="appointment_date" string="Date" widget="date"/> <field name="appointment_date" string="Time" widget="time"/> </xpath> </data>
